from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a sports team (or related entities) into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Mapping of predicates to natural‑language templates
    templates = {
        "numberOfMembers": lambda s, o: f"{s} has {o} members",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"{s} played in the {o} season",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays at {o}",
        "fullName": lambda s, o: f"The full name of {s} is {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {s} is {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"The owner of {s} is {o}",
        "nickname": lambda s, o: f"{s} is nicknamed {o}",
        "chairmanTitle": lambda s, o: f"The {o} of {s}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "part": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes {o}",
        "mayor": lambda s, o: f"The mayor of {s} is {o}",
        "champions": lambda s, o: f"The champions of {s} are {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "leaderParty": lambda s, o: f"The leader party of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} was in youth club {o}",
        "operator": lambda s, o: f"{s} is operated by {o}",
        "tenant": lambda s, o: f"{s} is tenant of {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the city of {o}",
        "state": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the state of {o}",
    }

    phrases = []
    def _clean(text: str) -> str:
        """Remove surrounding quotes from a literal string."""
        return text.strip().strip('\"').strip("'")

    for t in triples:
        formatter = templates.get(t.predicate)
        subj = _clean(t.subject)
        obj = _clean(t.object)
        if formatter:
            phrases.append(formatter(subj, obj))
        else:
            # Fallback for unexpected predicates
            phrases.append(f"{subj} {t.predicate} {obj}")

    # Join all parts into a single fluent sentence using proper conjunctions
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
